title: Culturing THP-1 Cells
author: Teesha C Luehr
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y6gfzbw
materials: Reguired supplements: 1 % volume, L-glutamine 10 % volume, Fetal Bovine Serum Most catalog numbers of RMPI-1640 contain L-glutamine, however, some do not. Ensure that it is in the media before using it for culturing.

steps.title: The base medium for this cell line is RMPI-1640
steps.instruction: The base medium for this cell line is RMPI-1640

steps.title: Optional Supplements
steps.instruction: Optional Supplements: 1 % volume, PenStrep 0.05 millimolar (mM), 2-mercaptoethanol PenStrep is not required for THP-1 culturing, however, if you are having issues with bacterial contamination, it can be used at 1X. 2-mercaptoethanol is stated as a required component for complete RPMI-1640 medium, however, in our laboratory it is not standard practice to add it.

steps.title: Always store cells in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Always store cells in liquid nitrogen. This is for both the original tube of cells from ATCC and any passages afterwards.

steps.title: Place the media bottle in the...
steps.instruction: Place the media bottle in the 37 °C, water bath at least 00:30:00, prior to using

steps.title: Thaw cells at 25 °C, (room...
steps.instruction: Thaw cells at 25 °C, (room temperature) for 00:10:00 or 37 °C, in a water bath for 00:02:00

steps.title: As soon as the cells are...
steps.instruction: As soon as the cells are thawed, transfer the cells to a 15 mL, conical tube and add 10 mL, of complete media Cells are stored with 5% DMSO, which can lyse cells if they are left for too long.

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Resuspend cells by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells by pipetting up and down 5X in 5 mL, complete media

steps.title: Sanitize all items going into the...
steps.instruction: Sanitize all items going into the Biological Safety Cabinet with 70% ethanol

steps.title: Transfer cells + media to a T-25 flask
steps.instruction: Transfer cells + media to a T-25 flask

steps.title: Incubate cells at 37 °C, and...
steps.instruction: Incubate cells at 37 °C, and 5% CO2 and 80% humidity

steps.title: THP-1 cells replicate after ~26 hours
steps.instruction: THP-1 cells replicate after ~26 hours. In practice, it takes 2 days for a true doubling.

steps.title: Once cells have doubled OR when...
steps.instruction: Once cells have doubled OR when media has begun to change colour, it is time to add media, split cells into new flasks, or to spin down to remove all media

steps.title: If concerned about cell concentration, perform a cell count
steps.instruction: If concerned about cell concentration, perform a cell count

steps.title: Double the total media volume with new complete media
steps.instruction: Double the total media volume with new complete media

steps.title: If concerned about cell concentration, perform a cell count
steps.instruction: If concerned about cell concentration, perform a cell count

steps.title: Carefully mix the new media in...
steps.instruction: Carefully mix the new media in by rocking the flask back and forth

steps.title: Once the volume limit is reached...
steps.instruction: Once the volume limit is reached for the T-25 flask it is time to move to a T-175 flask

steps.title: Remove all cell + media from...
steps.instruction: Remove all cell + media from the T-25 flask and transfer them to the T-175 flask This has to be done with a 10 mL, pipette because the larger volume pipettes do not fit in the T-25.

steps.title: Double the total media volume with new complete media
steps.instruction: Double the total media volume with new complete media

steps.title: If cells are appearing unhappy, it...
steps.instruction: If cells are appearing unhappy, it may be beneficial to remove all of the current media and dead cells and replenish with new complete media

steps.title: Transfer all cell + media to 50mL conical tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer all cell + media to 50mL conical tubes

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Resuspend cells by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells by pipetting up and down 5X in new complete media. Unless cells were at a drastically low cell concentration, resuspend cells in the same volume of media they were in before pelleting.

steps.title: Transfer cells to a new T-flask
steps.instruction: Transfer cells to a new T-flask

steps.title: Place the flask back in the incubator
steps.instruction: Place the flask back in the incubator

steps.title: Place all flasks in the incubator
steps.instruction: Place all flasks in the incubator

steps.title: Place flask into the incubator
steps.instruction: Place flask into the incubator
